author: felicepantaleo
body:
Two fixes for the TICL candidate extra table introduced by PR https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51242
1. The table producer resolves the candidates' trackster edm::Ptr keys against the configured tracksters collection, which pointed at `ticlTrackstersCLUE3DHigh` while the TICLCandidate Ptrs reference the final trackster collection produced by `ticlCandidate`: the per-candidate track indices were silently read from the wrong tracksters collection. Point the input at the collection the candidates reference.
2. The producer also propagates tracks to the HGCAL surfaces, which needs the propagator EventSetup (`TrackingComponentsRecord`). A NANO-only job does not schedule the reconstruction, so nothing provides that record and the job fails with `NoRecord`; load the propagator modules in the HGCAL Nano customization.
title: DPGAnalysis/HGCalNanoAOD: fix candidate extra table inputs
